info.name: Story Generation API
info.description: Complete Postman collection for story generation endpoints - event-driven, input-driven, with mocking and polling support

item.name: 1. Generate Story (Input-Driven, Skip Images, Mock Mode)

body.raw:
{
  "child_id": "{{child_id}}",
  "mode": "INPUT_DRIVEN",
  "age_group": "5-7",
  "category": "adventure",
  "learning_goal": "courage",
  "context": "Emma loves exploring and learning about nature. She's curious and brave.",
  "skip_image_generation": true,
  "skip_validation": false
}

request.description:
Generate story with INPUT-DRIVEN mode (category, learning goal, context)

With skip_image_generation=true for fast testing

item.name: 2. Generate Story (Input-Driven, Full with Images, Mock Mode)

body.raw:
{
  "child_id": "{{child_id}}",
  "mode": "INPUT_DRIVEN",
  "age_group": "5-7",
  "category": "learning",
  "learning_goal": "friendship",
  "context": "A story about making new friends at school",
  "skip_image_generation": false,
  "skip_validation": false
}

request.description:
Generate story with INPUT-DRIVEN mode with FULL image generation

With skip_image_generation=false to generate all images

body.raw:
{
  "child_id": "{{child_id}}",
  "mode": "INPUT_DRIVEN",
  "age_group": "2-4",
  "category": "animals",
  "learning_goal": "colors",
  "context": "Little ones learn about animals and colors",
  "skip_image_generation": true,
  "skip_validation": false
}

request.description:
Generate story for TODDLER age group (2-4)

Shows age-appropriate vocabulary and page count

item.name: 1. Generate Story (Event-Driven, Skip Images, Mock Mode)

body.raw:
{
  "child_id": "{{child_id}}",
  "mode": "EVENT_DRIVEN",
  "age_group": "5-7",
  "event_description": "Today Emma learned to ride a bike without training wheels for the first time! She felt scared at first but kept trying and finally did it!",
  "skip_image_generation": true,
  "skip_validation": false
}

request.description:
Generate story with EVENT-DRIVEN mode (personal event)

Convert real-life events into educational stories

body.raw:
{
  "child_id": "{{child_id}}",
  "mode": "EVENT_DRIVEN",
  "age_group": "8-12",
  "event_description": "Yesterday Emma's soccer team lost their championship game. At first she felt disappointed, but she realized she made great friends and learned important skills. The coach praised her effort and teamwork.",
  "skip_image_generation": false,
  "skip_validation": false
}

request.description:
Generate story from EVENT with FULL image generation

For advanced age group (8-12) with longer text

body.raw:
{
  "child_id": "{{child_id}}",
  "mode": "EVENT_DRIVEN",
  "age_group": "5-7",
  "event_description": "Emma helped her little brother when he was sad. She listened to him, gave him a hug, and they played together. He felt better and smiled.",
  "skip_image_generation": true,
  "skip_validation": false
}

request.description: Another event-based story: Emma helping sibling

Get story details by ID - Use for POLLING

Returns:
- PENDING: Story still generating
- IN_PROGRESS: Workflow executing
- COMPLETED: Story ready with pages and images
- FAILED: Generation failed

item.name: 2. Get Story (Wait for Completion - Polling Loop)

exec: console.log('Story still generating... will retry in 5 seconds');

request.description:
Polling endpoint - Keep calling until COMPLETED

In production, frontend would poll every 3-5 seconds

Get audit trail for story generation workflow

Shows all 6 steps:
- Step name
- Status (COMPLETED/FAILED)
- Retry count
- Error messages
- Timing data (started_at, completed_at)

List all stories for current user

Returns stories in reverse chronological order (newest first)

List stories for a specific child

Filter by child_id query parameter
Create a reusable generic story record in the generic_stories table.
Paginated generic story listing. Response data shape: { items, total, page, page_size, total_pages }.
Update a generic story by ID. Run Create Generic Story first to populate {{generic_story_id}}.
Delete a generic story. This also removes matching generic child-book assignments.
Adds an active generic story to a child's available books. Run Create Generic Story first.
Paginated books available to the child. Optional status filter: not_started, in_progress, completed.
Remove a book from the child's available library.

body.raw:
{
  "child_id": "{{child_id}}",
  "mode": "INPUT_DRIVEN",
  "age_group": "8-12",
  "category": "fantasy",
  "learning_goal": "creativity",
  "context": "A fantasy adventure with magic and dragons",
  "skip_image_generation": true,
  "skip_validation": true
}

request.description:
Skip plan validation for faster generation

With skip_validation=true:
- Skips validation retries
- No error feedback loop
- Faster but less robust

item.name: 2. Generate with All Features (Event + Full Images)

body.raw:
{
  "child_id": "{{child_id}}",
  "mode": "EVENT_DRIVEN",
  "age_group": "8-12",
  "event_description": "Emma participated in her first school play. She was nervous but remembered her lines and the audience loved her performance. She felt proud and excited.",
  "skip_image_generation": false,
  "skip_validation": false
}

request.description:
Full story generation with ALL features:
- Event-driven mode
- Advanced age group (8-12)
- Full image generation
- Validation enabled

This will take 3-5 minutes but generate complete story with images

body.raw:
{
  "child_id": "{{child_id}}",
  "mode": "INPUT_DRIVEN",
  "age_group": "5-7",
  "category": "mystery",
  "learning_goal": "problem_solving",
  "context": "A mysterious treasure hunt in a magical forest",
  "skip_image_generation": true,
  "skip_validation": false
}

request.description: Test with 'mystery' category and 'problem_solving' goal
